title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: fwupd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for fwupd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.

fixes.description: Please backport Fedora 40 changes in fwupd if needed (2025-02-09)

full_text:
An update for fwupd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
